creator: sziszi@petra.hos.u-szeged.hu
text:
Hi!

What does your /etc/rc.conf and ifconfig -a have to say? Also the output
of uname -a would be more helpful then just "FreeBSD 3.3".

Cheers!

Szilveszter ADAM
